mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_notifications (id, user_id, type, unique_key, title, content, aggregate_type, aggregate_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{uniqueKey}, #{title}, #{content}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE user_notifications SET read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
